get.description: Returns all contests where the authenticated user is a participant
get.summary: Get all contests the user participates in

get.description: Returns all contests created by a specific owner with pagination

delete.description: Deletes a contest by id. Only the contest owner can delete

patch.description: Updates the values of a contest

get.description: Owner gets all invite links for a contest
get.summary: Get all invites for a contest

post.description: Owner creates an invite link with specified role and square limit
post.summary: Create an invite link for a contest

get.description: Returns all participants and their roles. Any participant can view. Public contests allow any authenticated user
get.summary: Get all participants for a contest

delete.description: Owner removes a participant, or a participant removes themselves; the removed participant's squares are cleared. The owner cannot be removed.
delete.summary: Remove a participant from a contest

patch.description: Owner updates a participant's role or max squares
patch.summary: Update a participant's role or square limit

post.description: Records the score and winner for a specific quarter
Deletes the most recently recorded quarter result and reverts the contest to the prior quarter. Only for manual (non game-linked) contests.
post.summary: Roll back the last quarter result

post.description: Clears the value and owner of every square owned by the authenticated user. Only the caller's own squares are affected.
post.summary: Clear all of the caller's squares in a contest

post.description: Claims a square for the authenticated user using their profile default initials
post.summary: Claim a single square in a contest

post.description: Clears a square's value and owner, making it available for anyone to claim
Starts the contest, transitioning from ACTIVE to Q1 and randomizing labels

get.description: Returns NFL games available to link a contest to when creating one
Returns UP if the service process is running
Checks database, NATS, and OIDC provider connectivity
Returns contest name and invite details without authentication

post.description: Authenticated user joins a contest via invite token

get.description: Returns public stats including contests created today, squares claimed today, and total active contests
Returns the profile of the authenticated user, creating it on first access

delete.description: Anonymizes contest history under the ghost identity and deletes the account; blocked while the user owns or participates in any active contest

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's default initials and applies them to their squares in active contests

get.description: Returns the non-terminal contests the user owns or participates in, which block account deletion
get.summary: Get the current user's active contests

get.description: Returns contest and square stats for the authenticated user
Establishes a persistent WebSocket connection to receive real-time updates for a specific contest
get.summary: Connect to WebSocket for real-time contest updates
